## Severity

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — Funds at risk or contract broken
- [ ] 🟠 High — Core feature broken, no workaround
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — Feature broken but workaround exists
- [ ] 🟢 Low — Cosmetic or minor inconvenience
